candidates.why: Primary top-line revenue label; preferred over duplicate total line.
Duplicate total revenue line with identical values; useful as fallback if label changes by year.

variables.notes: Using priority order: prefer the more direct top-line label 'Revenue', with 'Total Revenue' as fallback.

candidates.why: Best direct cost / cost of sales style line; appears to aggregate materials and service-related production/service costs.
Inventory change can be a COGS component, but this row is sparsely populated and likely already embedded in 'Materials and Services'.
Balance sheet asset, not an income statement expense; not suitable for COGS.
Balancing row should not be used.

variables.notes: Selected the best direct-cost subtotal rather than sparse subcomponents/balancing rows.

candidates.why: Core overhead/personnel cost component.
Could be overhead, but appears grouped under 'Materials and Services' and thus closer to direct costs here.
Broad operating overhead bucket and populated across years.

Possible overhead component but empty and less comprehensive than Employee Expenses.
Possible SG&A component but empty in preview.

Likely duplicate/alternate personnel label but empty in preview.
Balance sheet asset, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: Per SG&A hierarchy, explicit SG&A row exists but is mostly empty, so included it plus closest overhead buckets for coverage. Excluded 'External services' because it sits within 'Materials and Services' and is more consistent with direct costs/COGS here. Excluded D&A and balancing/total rows.
